description: Timeout policy for Claude Code hooks. Runtime hooks in settings.json must declare timeout explicitly; generated inventories may use this policy only as a transition fallback.
runtime_requirement: Every hook entry in settings.json must have timeout_seconds. Missing runtime timeout is an audit failure.

default_timeout_rules.name: notification-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: Local notification hooks must never delay the turn.

default_timeout_rules.name: pretool-blocking-p0-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: P0 local guards should fail fast.

default_timeout_rules.name: pretool-blocking-llm
default_timeout_rules.reason: Blocking LLM-assisted reminders need a hard upper bound.

default_timeout_rules.name: pretool-blocking-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: Blocking local reminders and guards should finish quickly.

default_timeout_rules.name: posttool-async-llm
default_timeout_rules.reason: Async LLM post-processors can do useful work but must not linger.

default_timeout_rules.name: posttool-async-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: Async local telemetry/cache updates should be short.

default_timeout_rules.name: posttool-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: Synchronous local post-processors should be fail-fast.

default_timeout_rules.name: stop-async-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: End-of-turn local persistence should finish within one user-visible pause.

default_timeout_rules.name: session-start-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: Startup local hooks should not block session availability.

default_timeout_rules.name: session-end-local
default_timeout_rules.reason: Session cleanup should be quick and fail-open.

default_timeout_rules.name: prompt-router
default_timeout_rules.reason: Prompt routing can inject context but must keep input latency bounded.

script_overrides.reason: Startup router performs compressed context loading and health side effects.
Bash post-processing may start Gemini/agy background scans.
Integrated Bash post-processing can run project-switch and failure-analysis checks.
Codex rescue has an internal 120 second timeout after repeated build/test failures.
PR summary generation intentionally waits for Codex before gh pr create.
Dependency impact analysis is an async LLM side effect.
Session-end summary generation is intentionally longer than local cleanup hooks.
Local reviewer prescan should complete or skip quickly.
Commit draft generation is user-visible but bounded.
Commit convention validation uses local LLM assistance.
Translation gate uses local LLM assistance.
Error summarization is async but should stay short.
Decision capture writes local knowledge and must avoid end-of-turn drag.
Knowledge rebuild is async local maintenance.
Turn finalization may run on PostToolUse and Stop.
